parameters.query: SELECT c.id as client_id, c.name as client_name FROM clients c WHERE c.id = {{ $json.body.client_id }} AND c.active = true
SELECT pack_name, enabled FROM client_packs WHERE client_id = {{ $json.body.client_id }}
SELECT integration_id, integration_name, integration_type, enabled, is_encrypted FROM client_integrations WHERE client_id = {{ $json.body.client_id }}
SELECT tm.member_id, tm.name, tm.email, tm.active, tm.max_concurrent_tasks FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.client_id = {{ $json.body.client_id }}

parameters.columns: event_type, event_category, severity, user_id, client_id, event_details, status, created_at
